handover_check.files_verified: 6 of 6 target MD files read successfully on disk; UTF-8 encoding confirmed

acceptance_criteria.criterion: security-agent.md contains all three patterns at lines 125-130: "Incremental Module Gate sequence" (line 125), "agent-run-id" (lines 127, 130), "module gate" (line 125 — "Incremental Module Gate"). MT-1 satisfied.

build-agent.md contains all three patterns within next_required_phase block (lines 132-138): "phase attestation" (lines 132, 138), "gates prepare-phase" (line 133), "phase-ci" (line 136). MT-2 part 1 satisfied.

build-agent.md contains all three patterns within deploy block (lines 140-144): "ACCEPT" (lines 140-141), "deploy" (line 140 — "자동 배포"; lines 141-143 — "deployment_manifest"), "PIPELINE_DEPLOY" (line 144 — "PIPELINE_DEPLOY_ROOT"). MT-2 part 2 satisfied.

agent-factory-agent.md contains all required patterns at lines 104-117: "## CODEOWNERS Protection Notice" header (line 104), "CODEOWNERS" mentioned (lines 104, 107, 112), "PR" + "review" co-located (line 110 — "PR reviewed by"; line 111 — "PR and review"), "protected" (line 106). MT-3 satisfied.

protocol-evolution-agent.md contains all required patterns at lines 119-136: "## CODEOWNERS and PR Review Gate" header (line 119), "CODEOWNERS" (lines 119, 121, 123, 129), "PR" + "review" (line 131 — "via a PR on the active pipeline branch"; line 134 — "phase-ci"), "protected" (line 121 — "is protected by CODEOWNERS"). MT-4 satisfied.

test-harness-agent.md contains all required patterns at lines 90-102: "## Deploy Path After ACCEPT" header (line 90), "deploy" multiple instances (lines 92-100), "PIPELINE_DEPLOY" (line 96 — "PIPELINE_DEPLOY_ROOT"), "ACCEPT" co-located with "deploy" (line 90 — section header; line 102 — "do not block ACCEPT"). MT-5 satisfied.

pm-agent.md contains all required patterns at lines 574-590: "## Pipeline Complete — Deploy Path" header (line 574), "G:\내 드라이브\터미널" path (lines 577, 580, 588), "PIPELINE_DEPLOY" (line 583 — "PIPELINE_DEPLOY_ROOT"), "deploy_path" field in pipeline_complete XML schema (lines 580, 588). "ACCEPT" + "deploy" co-located (line 576 — "gates accept --result ACCEPT" triggers automatic deploy; line 589). MT-6 satisfied.

security-agent.md still contains existing orchestrator-only context. Verified at lines 17-18, 41, 77, 121, 128-133. Original sections (Role, Gate Logic, 12-Point Checklist, Risk Level Decision Matrix, Output Format, remediation_code Strict Enforcement, Power Automate trigger) all intact. New "## Integration Context" section appended at end (lines 123-133) — addition-only behavior confirmed. Git diff shows zero deletion lines across all 6 target MD files (verified via `git show f44b9d0 -- .claude/agents/*.md | grep ^-[^-]` returns empty).

edge_cases.utf8_encoding: All 6 files confirmed as UTF-8 (verified via `file` command): - security-agent.md: "exported SGML document, Unicode text, UTF-8 text" - build-agent.md: "Python script, Unicode text, UTF-8 text" - agent-factory-agent.md: "exported SGML document, Unicode text, UTF-8 text" - protocol-evolution-agent.md: "Unicode text, UTF-8 text" - test-harness-agent.md: "Unicode text, UTF-8 text" - pm-agent.md: "Unicode text, UTF-8 text"
edge_cases.no_existing_section_conflict: Added sections appended at end-of-file (or near end) without conflicting with existing Forbidden rules: - security-agent.md "## Integration Context" — does not contradict orchestrator-only sec record rule (line 18); reinforces it. - build-agent.md next_required_phase update — augments existing Phase 7 reference, not replaces. - agent-factory-agent.md "## CODEOWNERS Protection Notice" — added after Constraints; consistent with existing v2.x rules. - protocol-evolution-agent.md "## CODEOWNERS and PR Review Gate" — added after Constraints; aligns with existing "no direct push" implicit rules. - test-harness-agent.md "## Deploy Path After ACCEPT" — added after Forbidden; consistent with existing user_visible_result requirement. - pm-agent.md "## Pipeline Complete — Deploy Path" — added near end; augments existing pipeline_complete XML schema, not replaces.

forbidden_check.other_agent_md_unchanged: PASS — git show f44b9d0 confirms only 6 target .claude/agents/*.md files modified. dev-agent.md, qa-agent.md, ui-app-agent.md, prompt-architect-agent.md, power-automate-agent.md NOT in commit diff.
forbidden_check.claude_md_unchanged: PASS — CLAUDE.md not in dev commit diff.
forbidden_check.pipeline_py_unchanged: PASS — pipeline.py not in dev commit diff.
forbidden_check.additions_only: PASS — `git show f44b9d0 -- .claude/agents/*.md | grep ^-[^-]` returns empty (zero deletion lines). Stat shows 6 files / 93 insertions / 0 deletions across MD files.

micro_task_boundary.notes: scope_manifest.json declares 6 micro-tasks (MT-1 through MT-6), each mapping 1:1 to one of the 6 target agent MD files. Git diff confirms exactly those 6 files were modified — no scope creep, no out-of-scope edits. Pipeline state evidence files (.pipeline/*, scope_manifest_MT-*.json, module_*.xml, integration_report.xml, .gitattributes) are pipeline metadata and not subject to scope_manifest declaration.

runtime_functional_check.execution_check_present: N/A — META-FS-PD task; no executable Python code to run. MD files are documentation patches.
runtime_functional_check.vsce_build_evidence: N/A — VSCE category not in tags.
runtime_functional_check.functional_binding_verified: PASS — All 8 acceptance criteria pattern checks executed via Grep on real file content.

qa_report.findings: All 7 functional acceptance criteria (T-1 through T-7) PASS. T-EDGE-1 confirms additions-only behavior with zero deletions. All 6 target MD files are valid UTF-8. All 6 PM micro-tasks (MT-1 through MT-6) reflected accurately on disk. No forbidden files modified (dev-agent, qa-agent, ui-app-agent, prompt-architect-agent, power-automate-agent, CLAUDE.md, pipeline.py untouched in dev commit f44b9d0). Scope manifest perfectly aligned with actual diff (6 declared = 6 modified). META-FS-PD task verification complete.
qa_report.improvement_suggestions: Minor observation (non-blocking, not a deduction): - protocol-evolution-agent.md line 134 references "phase-ci" via the phrase "phase-ci to pass" but uses lowercase generic phrasing rather than the full command form `python pipeline.py gates phase-ci --phase ...`. Consider tightening to the exact command in a future patch for consistency with build-agent.md format. - pm-agent.md "## Pipeline Complete — Deploy Path" section uses both `` placeholder syntax (line 577) and `{pipeline_id}` template literal syntax (line 580, 588). Both are documentation, but mixing styles slightly reduces clarity. These are stylistic suggestions only and do not affect verdict.
